keyEvents.text: Goal! Montserrat 1, Belize 0. Mark Rogers (Montserrat) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Freybin Pagoada (Belize) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Substitution, Belize. Horace Ávila replaces Alence Ayala.
Substitution, Montserrat. Sydney Mendes replaces Lenni Cirino because of an injury.
Lucas Kirnon (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card.
